name: 【出品】02_06b-eBay出品-エラー復旧エージェント_V5

parameters.query: SELECT p.id, p.sku, p.english_title, p.title, p.ebay_category_id, p.ddp_price_usd, p.price_usd, p.condition, p.listing_data, COALESCE(p.ebay_account, 'mjt') as ebay_account, p.user_id, p.updated_at, elh.error_code, elh.error_message, elh.created_at as error_at, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM error_recovery_attempts era WHERE era.product_id = p.id AND era.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'), 0) as retry_count_24h FROM products_master p INNER JOIN ebay_listing_history elh ON p.id = elh.product_id WHERE p.workflow_status = 'error' AND p.user_id = $1 AND elh.result = 'error' AND elh.created_at = (SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM ebay_listing_history WHERE product_id = p.id) AND ($2 = true OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM error_recovery_attempts era WHERE era.product_id = p.id AND era.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')) ORDER BY elh.created_at DESC LIMIT $3

nodes.name: エラー商品取得（24hリトライ制限・user_id検証）

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { success: true, summary: { total: 0 }, message: 'エラー商品なし（または24h以内にリトライ済み）' } }];

parameters.query: SELECT error_code, error_category, auto_recoverable, recovery_strategy, required_fields FROM ebay_error_dictionary

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...data, success: false, action: 'not_auto_recoverable', reason: data.recovery_strategy } }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gemini-1.5-flash', prompt: 'eBay出品エラーを解析し修正データを提案してください。

【商品】SKU: ' + $json.sku + ', タイトル: ' + $json.title + ', カテゴリID: ' + $json.category_id + '
【エラー】コード: ' + $json.error_code + ', メッセージ: ' + ($json.error_message || '').substring(0, 300) + '
【カテゴリ】' + $json.error_category + '
【戦略】' + $json.recovery_strategy + '

JSON形式で回答: {"diagnosis":"診断","corrections":{"Brand":"値","MPN":"値"},"confidence":0.8,"reasoning":"理由"}' }) }}

nodes.name: 診断結果パース＆修正適用

parameters.query: UPDATE products_master SET listing_data = $1::jsonb, workflow_status = 'approved', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $2 AND user_id = $3 AND updated_at = $4 RETURNING id

nodes.name: 修正データDB保存（楽観的ロック）

parameters.query: INSERT INTO error_recovery_attempts (user_id, product_id, sku, original_error_code, original_error_message, ai_diagnosis, recovery_strategy, data_corrections, retry_result, attempt_number, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, '{{ JSON.stringify({ d: ($json.ai_diagnosis?.diagnosis || '').substring(0, 100), c: $json.confidence }).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb, $6, '{{ JSON.stringify($json.corrections || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb, $7, $8, NOW())
DELETE FROM error_recovery_attempts WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'

parameters.name: body
parameters.value:
=[info][title]🔧 エラー復旧AIエージェント完了[/title]処理: {{ $json.summary.total }}件
✅自動復旧: {{ $json.summary.recovered }}件
⚠️要確認: {{ $json.summary.needs_review }}件
❌復旧不可: {{ $json.summary.not_recoverable }}件[/info]

nodes.name: 🔐 HMAC署名検証
nodes.notes: [EMPIRE_OS_V6] セキュリティ強制挿入
